query: How many documents are in the library total?
response: The library holds a total of 44,937 documents, encompassing a wide range of traditions. Among these, the Hindu texts include profound insights such as the declaration that ["Vasudeva is the Supreme (cause) of the universe"](https://oceanlibrary.com/mahabharata-12_vyasa/?paraId=para_1149), as noted in *The Mahabharata*. In the Islamic tradition, the Qur'án begins with the invocation ["In the name of the merciful and compassionate God"](https://oceanlibrary.com/quran_palmer-tr/?paraId=para_4). The Buddhist collection, rich with teachings, includes the *Sutra Collection*, which provides deep insights into meditation and mindfulness practices.
